title: leucosceptrum canum
intro: Leucosceptrum canum, also known as the White Pagoda plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leucosceptrum canum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting digestive health. Leucosceptrum canum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
